name: Review assistant
description: Audit saved records for missing fields, inconsistencies, or extraction errors.

name: Record lookup
description: Look up details about a specific saved record or flower by name or record number.

name: Tutor/coach
description: Answer questions about your garden using saved records as context.

name: Maintenance prompts
description: Flag outdated or contradictory record data and suggest updates.

name: Summaries
description: Generate seasonal or location summaries for journals or labels.

name: Season and garden planning
description: Get planting, reorder, or layout suggestions based on past seasons.

name: Cultivar research
description: Look up traits and growing behavior for specific dahlia varieties.

name: Arrangement and design
description: Get combination suggestions for bouquets or garden aesthetics using your saved colors and forms.

name: Problem diagnosis
description: Describe symptoms and get likely causes and treatment suggestions.

name: Dahlia questions
description: Answer general dahlia care questions: planting, fertilizing, watering, storing, overwintering, and more.
